category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Montenegro EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入黑山：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入黑山：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Montenegro CE-aspiring product expectations, ISME-referenced electrical requirements, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector practice, OCPP readiness, port routing via Bar, and safety and EMC evidence before grid connection.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与黑山 CE 倾向产品要求、ISME 参考电气要求、IEC 61851 安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 接口实践、OCPP 就绪度、经巴尔港口的运输路径以及并网前的安全与 EMC 证据差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與黑山 CE 倾向產品要求、ISME 參考電氣要求、IEC 61851 安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 接口實務、OCPP 就緒度、經巴爾港口的運輸路徑以及併網前的安全與 EMC 證據差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Montenegro, the practical gates are CE-oriented conformity for in-scope low-voltage and EMC requirements, IEC 61851 evidence, connector compatibility around IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2, CGES and REGAGEN project-connection governance, OCPP interoperability where required, and customs clearance and routing documentation for import logistics through Bar.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入黑山时，关键门槛包括适用范围内 CE 对齐的低电压和 EMC 合规、IEC 61851 证据、围绕 IEC 62196 Type 2 与 CCS2 的接口兼容性、CGES 与 REGAGEN 的项目并网治理、必要时的 OCPP 互操作性，以及经巴尔港口通关和运输路径文件。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入黑山時，關鍵門檻包括適用範圍內 CE 對齊的低電壓與 EMC 合規、IEC 61851 證據、圍繞 IEC 62196 Type 2 與 CCS2 的介面兼容性、CGES 與 REGAGEN 的項目並網治理、必要時的 OCPP 互通性，以及經巴爾港口通關和運輸路徑文件。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, standards interpretation, REGAGEN approval, CGES connection approval, customs clearance decision, electrical-installation design approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charging-network operators, and installers should verify current Montenegro requirements before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE适用范围裁定、标准解释、REGAGEN批准、CGES接入批准、通关决策、 电气安装设计批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前应与合格专业人士核实现行黑山要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE適用範圍裁定、標準解釋、REGAGEN批准、CGES接入批准、通關決策、 電氣安裝設計批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電網路營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前應與合格專業人士核驗現行黑山要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
